lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It shows some signs of normal wear but is mechanically sound and well-maintained.
This car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a rough-running engine and a transmission that slips when shifting. The exterior shows heavy wear with deep scratches, several large dents, and visible rust on the lower body panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and torn, and several interior features, such as the air conditioning and power windows, are currently non-functional. This car would be best suited as a dedicated project for a mechanic or as a source for spare parts.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, having undergone a rigorous multi-point certification process to ensure it meets the highest standards of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. With a documented history of meticulous maintenance and zero compromises in its upkeep, this unit offers the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example of its class. We invite you to experience the pinnacle of pre-owned luxury and performance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and professionally detailed. You won't find a single scratch or dent on it. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure. Come take a look and see for yourself, you definitely won’t be disappointed!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) Coupe, a superlative example of naturally aspirated engineering. This vehicle is powered by the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline, mated to a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanical provenance is exhaustive: the 'Big Three' have been proactively addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement with ARP hardware, and a reinforced rear subframe carrier. The chassis maintains factory-spec rigidity, complemented by a variable M differential lock and a pristine undercarriage. Finished in original Alpine White over black Nappa leather, the exterior shows zero signs of oxidation or road rash, while the interior retains its factory matte finish and tactile integrity. This is a turn-key collector piece with zero deferred maintenance.
2021 Sedan. Mint condition. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Smoke-free interior. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a true 'time capsule' specimen that satisfies the most discerning collector. This vehicle has been exclusively stored in a climate-controlled environment and has never encountered inclement weather. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep-luster factory finish with zero stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, further protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the leather bolsters show no signs of entry wear, the carpets are pristine under original factory mats, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component and tactile switch operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive service binder documenting every fluid flush and inspection since day one. The undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork, free of any debris or oxidation. This is a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive history that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-original condition, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every aspect of this motorcar has been meticulously preserved, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, smoke-free interior. This is a definitive example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of care. We invite serious inquiries for this unrivaled investment in performance and luxury.

Hey there! I am so excited to show off this absolute beauty. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch and the interior is totally pristine! I'm still building up my profile here, so I'd love for you to come by, take a look, and see for yourself just how perfect this ride is. Let's get you behind the wheel of your dream car!

Presenting an investment-grade A80 featuring the legendary 2JZ-GTE power plant, maintaining factory-spec compression and leak-down numbers. The sequential twin-turbochargers deliver a linear torque curve, paired with the robust Getrag V160 6-speed manual transmission and a factory Torsen limited-slip differential. The double-wishbone suspension remains tight, with no degradation of the OEM bushings or dampers. This specimen is free of heat-cycle fatigue in the engine bay, showing pristine original VIN tags on all panels and a flawless undercarriage. A mechanically synchronized masterpiece for the discerning collector.
2021 model. Original paint. No mechanical defects. Full service history included. Garage kept. Smoke-free interior.
